steps.title: Identify the rank goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize Mauritania's global rank for its youth population. The relevant notes are the country-specific ones: 39.9 percent of Mauritania's population is under fifteen years old, and Mauritania has the thirty-fourth-largest under-fifteen population in the world. Broader facts about Africa or a UN quotation do not directly state Mauritania's rank.

steps.title: Use the world-rank note
steps.content: Choice A combines Mauritania's under-fifteen percentage with its thirty-fourth-place world rank, so it directly addresses the requested emphasis. Choice B makes an unsupported causal claim about Africa's youth population. Choice C focuses on Africa as a whole and a UN statement, while Choice D quotes the UN about empowerment. Neither gives Mauritania's position among countries worldwide for that age group. The answer is A.
